title: Easy Gaps
description: Easier crafting recipe for Gaps & EGaps!
body:
# Easy Gaps
Easier Crafting recipe for Golden Apples
________________________________________________________________________________________________
## World Installation
1. Win + R Type '%appdata%' or 'appdata' Enter
2. Open <.minecraft> folder
3. Go to <saves>
4. Open <your world> folder
4. Drag and Drop 'Easy Gaps' to <datapacks> folder
## Server Installation
1. Open Server Folder
2. Go to <world>
3. Drag and Drop 'Easy Gaps' to <datapacks> folder
## Recipes
